title: Nonlinear parabolic problem with time fractional derivative
summary: Time fractional parabolic problem for p-Laplacian with double singular Hardy-type potential is considered. Comparison principle and appriory estimates for the weak solutions are proved. Existence of global weak solutions and finite-time blow-up are investigated depending on the optimal Hardy constant.

AI.tldr: 研究带双奇异Hardy型势的p-Laplacian时间分数阶抛物问题的解的存在性、比较原理和爆破行为
AI.motivation: 研究时间分数阶导数、p-Laplacian算子与双奇异Hardy型势相结合的非线性抛物问题，这类问题在非局部扩散过程和奇异势场中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用比较原理、先验估计、弱解理论、Hardy不等式和爆破分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了弱解的比较原理和先验估计，建立了全局弱解的存在性，并基于最优Hardy常数研究了有限时间爆破现象
AI.significance: 将经典抛物问题的Hardy势理论推广到时间分数阶情形，为奇异势场中的非局部扩散过程提供了理论分析框架

title: Conformally invariant equations with negative critical exponents on the three dimensional hyperbolic space
summary:
We establish a symmetry result for positive entire solutions with a prescribed growth rate to the following fourth order equation on the 3-dimensional hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^3$: \[ P_2 u = - u^{-7}, \] where $P_2$ denotes the fourth-order Paneitz operator. We prove that any positive solution $u$ on $\mathbb{H}^3$ exhibiting exponential growth at infinity must, up to hyperbolic isometries, be radial and strictly decreasing with respect to some point $P \in \mathbb{H}^3$.
  Fourth order equations with negative critical growth on 3-dimensional Euclidean space $\mathbb{R}^3$ has been studied by Choi and Xu in \cite{CX09 }, and subsequently by McKenna and Reichel \cite{MR03} and Xu \cite{Xu05}. Unlike the Euclidean case, the behavior of the Green's function of $P_2$ is substantially different, which prevents us from using the moving plane (sphere) method directly.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维双曲空间中具有指数增长的正解关于Paneitz算子的径向对称性
AI.motivation: 研究三维双曲空间$\mathbb{H}^3$上四阶Paneitz算子的方程$P_2 u = -u^{-7}$的正解对称性，该方程具有负临界增长，与欧氏空间$\mathbb{R}^3$上的类似问题形成对比
AI.techniques: 采用双曲空间几何分析，克服Green函数行为差异带来的困难，避免直接使用移动平面（球面）法，发展适用于双曲空间的对称性证明技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明任何在无穷远处具有指数增长的正解$u$，在双曲等距变换下必然是径向的，且关于某点$P \in \mathbb{H}^3$严格递减
AI.significance: 将欧氏空间中的四阶方程对称性结果推广到双曲空间，揭示了非平坦几何对解结构的影响，为双曲空间上的高阶椭圆方程研究提供新方法

title: Notes on an intuitive approach to elliptic homogenization
summary: Elliptic homogenization is used to determine coarse-grained properties of materials with features on small scales for heat transfer and elasticity. When microstructural features of a material have rapid, periodic fluctuations, the solution corresponding to a "homogenized" coefficient field closely resembles the true solution based on the heterogeneous material. Most presentations of elliptic homogenization rely on methods from perturbation theory, which can make an intuitive, physical understanding of the homogenized coefficients elusive. In this set of notes, we derive the homogenized coefficients for one- and two-dimensional elliptic boundary value problems based on arguments which are physically motivated, and with no recourse to perturbation theory. Then, we discuss homogenization of the Laplace-Beltrami operator for heat conduction on thin surfaces with multiscale curvature, an example which has seen minimal treatment in existing literature.

AI.tldr: 通过物理直观方法推导椭圆齐次化系数，避免微扰理论，并处理薄曲面上的Laplace-Beltrami算子齐次化问题。
AI.motivation: 椭圆齐次化用于确定具有小尺度特征材料的粗粒度性质，但传统基于微扰理论的方法使得齐次化系数的物理直观理解变得困难。本文旨在通过物理动机明确的论证推导齐次化系数，并处理现有文献中较少涉及的薄曲面多尺度曲率情况。
AI.techniques: 采用物理直观的论证方法而非微扰理论；处理一维和二维椭圆边值问题；研究薄曲面上Laplace-Beltrami算子的齐次化；考虑多尺度曲率效应。
AI.main_theorems: 推导了一维和二维椭圆边值问题的齐次化系数；建立了薄曲面上Laplace-Beltrami算子的齐次化理论；为具有多尺度曲率特征的薄曲面热传导问题提供了齐次化框架。
AI.significance: 提供了更直观物理理解的齐次化方法，避免了传统微扰理论的抽象性；扩展了齐次化理论到薄曲面几何，对复合材料、微结构材料和曲面热传导问题有重要应用价值。

title: On singular $p$-Laplacian problems with discontinuous convection terms
summary: The existence of positive strong solutions to a homogeneous Dirichlet $p$-Laplacian problem, with reaction sum of a both singular at zero and highly discontinuous nonlinearity and of a discontinuous convection term, is established. Locality arguments, based on suitable measure theoretical results (see Section 3), are employed.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有奇异性和高度不连续非线性项的p-Laplacian问题正强解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异性和高度不连续性的p-Laplacian问题，这类问题在数学物理和工程中有重要应用，但奇异性和不连续性给解的存在性分析带来挑战
AI.techniques: 使用局部性论证方法，基于适当的测度理论结果，处理奇异性和高度不连续的非线性项
AI.main_theorems: 建立了齐次Dirichlet边界条件下p-Laplacian问题正强解的存在性，其中反应项包含在零点奇异和高度不连续的非线性项以及不连续的对流项
AI.significance: 扩展了p-Laplacian问题的解存在性理论，为处理具有奇异性和高度不连续性的非线性偏微分方程提供了新的分析框架

title: Global Well-Posedness for the Fourth-Order Nonlinear Schrödinger Equation with Potential in the Energy-Critical Case
summary: We consider the defocusing fourth-order nonlinear Schrödinger equation with potential \[ i\partial_t u + Δ^2 u + Vu + λ|u|^{p-1}u = 0 \qquad (x \in \mathbb{R}^n,\ t \in \mathbb{R}), \] in dimensions $n \ge 5$. In the energy-critical case $p = \frac{n+4}{n-4}$, under suitable assumptions on a radial real-valued potential $V$, we prove global well-posedness for radial initial data in $H^2(\mathbb{R}^n)$. We also show that every such solution scatters in $H^2$ to a free solution of the biharmonic Schrödinger equation. The proof relies on Strichartz estimates for fourth-order Schrödinger operators with potential, equivalence of Sobolev norms associated with $Δ^2+V$ and $Δ^2$, boundedness of wave operators, perturbative stability theory, and a Morawetz-type estimate adapted to the presence of a potential. This extends earlier results for the case without potential to a class of radial potentials.

AI.tldr: 证明了带势能的四阶非线性薛定谔方程在能量临界情形下的全局适定性和散射性
AI.motivation: 研究带势能的四阶非线性薛定谔方程（defocusing fourth-order NLS with potential）在能量临界情形下的长时间行为，特别是全局适定性和散射性，将无势能情形的结果推广到一类径向势能情形
AI.techniques: 使用带势能的四阶薛定谔算子的Strichartz估计、Δ²+V与Δ²相关Sobolev范数的等价性、波算子的有界性、摄动稳定性理论，以及适应势能存在的Morawetz型估计
AI.main_theorems: 在维度n≥5、能量临界指数p=(n+4)/(n-4)条件下，对满足适当假设的径向实值势能V，证明了径向初值在H²(ℝⁿ)中的全局适定性，并证明所有此类解在H²中散射到双调和薛定谔方程的自由解
AI.significance: 将四阶NLS的散射理论推广到带势能情形，发展了处理高阶薛定谔方程与势能相互作用的新技术，为研究更一般的非线性和势能组合提供了理论框架

title: Vorticity confinement for 2D incompressible flows in an infinite cylinder
summary: We study the confinement of vorticity for two-dimensional incompressible flows in an infinite cylinder. For Navier-Stokes solutions with non-negative and compactly supported initial vorticity, we derive quantitative decay estimates showing that the vorticity mass outside regions whose distance from the initial support grows like $\sqrt{t\log^αt}$ (with $α>1$) or like $t^β$ (with $β>1/2$) becomes, respectively, super-polynomially or stretched-exponentially small. The analysis combines an iterative scheme with an antisymmetry property of the Biot-Savart kernel. In the Euler case, by coupling this approach with a first-moment estimate from [Commun. Math. Phys., 367, 1077-1093, 2019], we recover the confinement bound of [Commun. Math. Phys., 367, 1077-1093, 2019] and refine it slightly: the diameter of the vorticity support grows at most like $(t\log t)^{1/3}$, rather than $t^{1/3}\log^2 t$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了无限圆柱中二维不可压缩流动的涡量限制问题，对Navier-Stokes和Euler方程分别给出了涡量支撑区域增长的定量估计。
AI.motivation: 研究二维不可压缩流动在无限圆柱中的涡量限制问题，特别是涡量支撑区域的增长速率。对于Navier-Stokes方程，初始涡量非负且具有紧支集的情况，需要定量描述涡量如何扩散到初始支撑区域之外。
AI.techniques: 结合迭代方案与Biot-Savart核的反对称性质，对于Euler方程还结合了[Commun. Math. Phys., 367, 1077-1093, 2019]中的一阶矩估计。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于Navier-Stokes解：初始支撑区域外距离以√(t log^α t)（α>1）或t^β（β>1/2）增长的区域内，涡量质量分别呈超多项式或拉伸指数衰减。2. 对于Euler方程：涡量支撑直径的增长上界为(t log t)^{1/3}，改进了先前t^{1/3} log^2 t的结果。
AI.significance: 提供了二维流动中涡量限制的精确定量估计，改进了先前结果，深化了对Navier-Stokes和Euler方程中涡量扩散机制的理解，对流体力学中的涡动力学有重要理论意义。

title: Dimension reduction of fractional Sobolev seminorms on thin domains
summary: We study the asymptotic behaviour of Gagliardo seminorms in $H^s$ defined on thin films $Ω_\e=ω\times(0,\e)$. The first relevant order is $\e^{1-2s}$, at which the corresponding limit captures the vertical fractional oscillations through one-dimensional sections. The second relevant order produces dimension-reduction regimes that undergo a qualitative transition at the critical exponent $s=\tfrac12$. For $s<\tfrac12$, the dominant contribution is driven by interactions at finite planar distance, and the dimension-reduction scale is $\e^2$. In this regime, the limit is a lower-dimensional \emph{fractional} energy with an effective gain of $\tfrac12$ in the differentiability index. At the critical exponent $s=1/2$, the dimension-reduction scale is $\e^{2}|\log\e|$, and the limit is {\em local}, with dominant interactions at scales between $\e$ and $1$, producing a Dirichlet-type limit on $ω$. For $s>\tfrac12$, the dominant contribution is instead driven by interactions at distances of order $\varepsilon$, the dimension-reduction scale is $\e^{3-2s}$, and the second-order $Γ$-limit is still local. We also study the case $s=s_\e\to 1^-$, showing a Bourgain--Brezis--Mironescu-type result.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了薄层上分数阶Sobolev空间Gagliardo半范的渐近行为，揭示了在临界指数s=1/2处发生定性转变的维度约化机制。
AI.motivation: 研究薄层区域Ω_ε=ω×(0,ε)上分数阶Sobolev空间H^s中Gagliardo半范的渐近行为，探索维度约化过程中分数阶微分的极限行为，特别关注临界指数s=1/2处的相变现象。
AI.techniques: 使用Γ-收敛理论、尺度分析、分数阶Sobolev空间理论、维度约化技术，以及Bourgain-Brezis-Mironescu型极限分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三个主要结果：1) s<1/2时，维度约化尺度为ε^2，极限为低维分数阶能量；2) s=1/2时，尺度为ε^2|logε|，极限为局部Dirichlet型能量；3) s>1/2时，尺度为ε^{3-2s}，极限仍为局部能量；4) 还研究了s→1^-时的Bourgain-Brezis-Mironescu型极限。
AI.significance: 揭示了分数阶微积分在维度约化过程中的复杂行为，特别是临界指数s=1/2处的定性转变，为薄层结构中的分数阶现象提供了理论基础，对材料科学、弹性力学等领域的薄层模型有重要应用价值。

title: Sheets of Spectral Data of Stokes Waves in Weakly Nonlinear Models
summary: We study the spectral stability of small-amplitude Stokes waves in a family of weakly nonlinear, unidirectional models of the form $u_t + L u + (u^2)_x = 0$. We introduce a perturbation method to expand the spectral data in wave amplitude near flat-state eigenvalue collisions, with the ratio of the colliding modes as a free parameter. This yields sheets of spectral data whose slices at fixed amplitude give isolas of instability. The same perturbation framework treats both high-frequency and Benjamin--Feir instabilities, extends to discontinuous dispersion relations (including the Akers--Milewski equation), and, for the first time, provides an analytic approximation of the Benjamin--Feir spectrum for this model and a direct comparison of high-frequency and Benjamin--Feir growth rates across the full family of models. Asymptotic predictions are validated against numerical spectra computed by Floquet--Fourier--Hill and quasi-Newton methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种扰动方法来分析弱非线性单向模型中斯托克斯波的光谱稳定性，统一处理高频和Benjamin-Feir不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究弱非线性单向模型$u_t + L u + (u^2)_x = 0$中小振幅斯托克斯波的光谱稳定性问题，特别是在平坦状态特征值碰撞附近的稳定性分析。
AI.techniques: 扰动方法展开波振幅附近的光谱数据，以碰撞模式比率为自由参数；使用Floquet-Fourier-Hill和拟牛顿方法进行数值验证。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了光谱数据片理论，固定振幅切片给出不稳定性孤岛；首次为该模型提供了Benjamin-Feir光谱的解析近似，并直接比较了高频和Benjamin-Feir增长率。
AI.significance: 统一处理了高频和Benjamin-Feir不稳定性，扩展到不连续色散关系（包括Akers-Milewski方程），为弱非线性波模型稳定性分析提供了新框架。

title: On the Hausdorff dimension and singularities of the monopolist's free boundary curve
summary: The simplest genuinely multidimensional monopolist's problem involves minimizing a linearly perturbed Dirichlet energy among nonnegative convex functions $u$ on an open domain $X \subset [0, \infty)^2$. The geometry of the region of strict convexity $Ω\subset X$ for the unique minimizer $u$ is of central interest. A relatively closed portion $X_1^0 \subset X$ of the domain is comprised of segments starting and ending on $\partial X$ along which $u$ is affine. For convex polygons and certain other domains $X \subset \mathbf{R}^2$, we build on results with Zhang to show that outside $X_1^0 \cup \{u=0\}$, the free boundary of $Ω$ is a continuous curve of Hausdorff dimension one, and that $Ω$ has density $1/2$ along it (and is $C^α_{\mathrm{loc}}$ for all $0<α<1$), except perhaps at a discrete set of singular points. We do this by showing that much of the free boundary solves an obstacle problem whose endogenous obstacle is $C^2$. For Rochet and Choné's square $X=(a,a+1)^2$ with $a>0$, there is a point $x_a$ on the diagonal such that $X_1^0\cap \partial Ω\subset \{x_a\}$, and the discrete singularities mentioned above can only accumulate at $x_a$ or at the two ends of the analytic arc $\{u=0\} \cap \partial Ω$, plus the two limit points of $X \cap \partial Ω$ on $\partial X$. Where the regularity of the endogenous obstacle can be improved to $C^{2,\mathrm{Dini}}$, the free boundary becomes locally $C^\infty$ outside a closed set whose relative interior is empty.

AI.tldr: 研究二维垄断者问题中严格凸区域自由边界的几何结构和正则性
AI.motivation: 分析最简单的多维垄断者问题，该问题涉及在非负凸函数中最小化线性扰动的Dirichlet能量，特别关注唯一最小化子的严格凸区域的几何结构
AI.techniques: 利用障碍问题方法，将自由边界问题转化为具有内生障碍的障碍问题，结合Hausdorff维数分析、密度估计和正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明在凸多边形等区域中，自由边界是Hausdorff维数为1的连续曲线，沿边界密度为1/2，具有局部C^α正则性；对于特定正方形区域，奇异点只能聚集在特定位置
AI.significance: 为多维垄断者问题提供了深刻的几何理解，建立了自由边界的正则性理论，将障碍问题方法应用于经济学中的优化问题

title: Existence of Solutions of the third term of the Connaughton-Newell Model with a source term
summary: The Connaughton-Newell equation is an approximation of three-wave kinetic equations using a fully non-linear coagulation-fragmentation model. This equation consists of three non-linear operators. In this paper, we proved that assuming a constant interaction kernel and a well-behaved source term, the third operator of the Connaughton-Newell equation has a solution.

AI.tldr: 证明了在常数相互作用核和良好源项条件下，Connaughton-Newell方程第三个算子的解存在性
AI.motivation: Connaughton-Newell方程是使用完全非线性凝聚-碎裂模型对三波动力学方程的近似，包含三个非线性算子，研究其解的存在性是理解该模型的基础
AI.techniques: 未在摘要中明确说明，但可能涉及非线性分析、泛函分析、不动点定理等证明算子解存在性的标准技术
AI.main_theorems: 在常数相互作用核和良好源项假设下，证明了Connaughton-Newell方程第三个算子解的存在性
AI.significance: 为理解Connaughton-Newell方程的整体解结构提供了基础，对三波相互作用和凝聚-碎裂过程的理论研究有重要意义

title: A nonlocal transmission problem on a hybrid continuous-discrete domain
summary: We study a quadratic nonlocal variational problem on a hybrid domain formed by a compact interval and finitely many discrete points. The associated energy splits into continuous, discrete, and interface contributions. Our main estimate shows that the interface term yields a coercive coupling between the two phases and provides an equivalent hybrid norm. As a consequence, we prove existence and uniqueness of a minimizer for the corresponding variational problem and characterize it as the unique weak solution of the associated hybrid Euler--Lagrange system. The latter combines a nonlocal integral equation on the continuous component with a finite nonlocal algebraic system on the discrete nodes.

AI.tldr: 建立了混合连续-离散域上二次非局部变分问题的适定性理论，证明了能量泛函的强制性、极小元存在唯一性及其对应的欧拉-拉格朗日系统解的存在唯一性。
AI.motivation: 研究由紧区间和有限离散点组成的混合域上的二次非局部变分问题，旨在建立连续相和离散相之间的耦合理论，为混合连续-离散系统提供数学分析框架。
AI.techniques: 采用变分方法，分析能量泛函的强制性性质，建立混合等价范数，利用直接法证明极小元存在性，通过严格单调性证明唯一性，并推导对应的欧拉-拉格朗日系统。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 界面项产生强制性耦合，提供等价混合范数；2. 变分问题极小元存在且唯一；3. 极小元是相应混合欧拉-拉格朗日系统的唯一弱解，该系统在连续部分为非局部积分方程，在离散节点为有限非局部代数系统。
AI.significance: 为混合连续-离散系统提供了严格的数学基础，建立了非局部算子连接连续介质和离散结构的理论框架，在材料科学、网络分析和多尺度建模中有潜在应用。

title: Inverse boundary value problems of determining nonlinear coefficients for the JMGT equation
summary: We consider inverse boundary value problems for the Jordan-Moore-Gibson-Thompson (JMGT) equation in nonlinear acoustics with quadratic nonlinearities of Kuznetsov-type and Westervelt-type. We show that the associated boundary Dirichlet-to-Neumann map uniquely determines the nonlinear coefficients $β$ in the Westervelt-type model, and the pair $(β,κ)$ in the Kuznetsov-type model, provided that the observation time is greater than the maximal boundary-to-boundary geodesic travel time. The results are obtained in both the Euclidean setting and on compact Riemannian manifolds with proper geometric assumptions. The proof is based on the idea of second order linearization combined with the construction of geometric optics and Gaussian beam solutions, reducing the inverse problem of uniqueness to the injectivity of associated geodesic ray transforms.

AI.tldr: 证明了非线性声学中JMGT方程逆边界值问题的唯一性，通过二阶线性化和几何光学构造将问题转化为测地线射线变换的注入性。
AI.motivation: 研究非线性声学中Jordan-Moore-Gibson-Thompson方程的逆边界值问题，该方程描述了热粘性声波传播，具有重要的医学成像和工业无损检测应用背景。
AI.techniques: 采用二阶线性化方法，结合几何光学解和高斯波束构造，将非线性逆问题转化为线性问题，最终归结为测地线射线变换的注入性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了边界Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射在观测时间大于最大边界到边界测地线传播时间时，能唯一确定Westervelt型模型中的非线性系数β，以及Kuznetsov型模型中的系数对(β,κ)。
AI.significance: 为非线性声学成像提供了严格的理论基础，将逆问题唯一性结果从线性情形推广到非线性模型，具有重要的理论和应用价值。

title: Absence of the Lavrentiev phenomenon for degenerate parabolic double phase problems
summary: We establish the absence of the Lavrentiev phenomenon for degenerate parabolic double phase problems. Any finite-energy function in the natural parabolic class admits smooth approximations with convergence in the parabolic Sobolev space and convergence of the corresponding energy. We provide explicit gap bound conditions and derive improved bounds under additional assumptions such as boundedness or stronger time regularity.

AI.tldr: 证明了退化抛物双相问题中不存在Lavrentiev现象，即自然抛物类中的有限能量函数都可以用光滑函数逼近，且能量收敛。
AI.motivation: 研究退化抛物双相问题中的Lavrentiev现象，该现象指某些函数无法用光滑函数逼近而保持能量收敛，这在变分问题中是一个重要障碍。
AI.techniques: 使用抛物Sobolev空间理论、双相问题分析、能量估计方法，以及显式间隙界条件和时间正则性假设下的改进估计。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了退化抛物双相问题中Lavrentiev现象的缺失定理，证明了自然抛物类中任何有限能量函数都存在光滑逼近，且逼近在抛物Sobolev空间中收敛，相应能量也收敛。
AI.significance: 为退化抛物双相问题的正则性理论提供了重要基础，确保了变分方法在该类问题中的有效性，对偏微分方程理论和变分分析有重要意义。

title: On the lower bound and upper bound of the Sum of Eigenvalues of the Fractional-Logarithmic Laplacian
summary: We establish a lower bound and an upper bound to the sum of the Fractional-Logarithmic Laplacian. A main challenge in such a study comes from the fact that this operator has a Fourier symbol that is not globally monotone in its radial variable due to its low-frequency behavior.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数-对数拉普拉斯算子之和的下界和上界估计
AI.motivation: 研究分数-对数拉普拉斯算子的性质，主要挑战在于该算子的傅里叶符号在其径向变量上不是全局单调的，这源于其低频行为
AI.techniques: 需要处理非单调傅里叶符号的算子，可能涉及调和分析、傅里叶分析、奇异积分算子理论等技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了分数-对数拉普拉斯算子之和的下界和上界估计
AI.significance: 对具有非单调傅里叶符号的奇异积分算子理论有重要贡献，为研究此类算子的性质提供了新的工具和方法

title: Variational characterizations of weighted eigenvalue and basic reproduction rate for nonlocal dispersal systems and application
summary: The basic reproduction rate is a crucial threshold parameter in infectious disease models. In nonlocal dispersal systems, its variational characterization is challenging due to the possible absence of a principal eigenvalue caused by non-compactness. In this paper, we aim to establish such a characterization even when the principal eigenvalue does not exist. To this end, we first study the spectral bound of a class of nonlocal dispersal operators, establishing a Collatz-Wielandt characterization as well as a Rayleigh-Ritz characterization when the operator is self-adjoint. Using this, we characterize the unique parameter value at which the spectral bound equals zero, covering both non-degenerate and partially degenerate cases, and subsequently obtain an explicit expression for the basic reproduction rate. To demonstrate the utility of our theoretical framework, we apply it to a nonlocal dispersal SIS epidemic model with saturated incidence rate. The analysis shows that, in the degenerate case of the saturation coefficient, the limiting behavior of the basic reproduction rate as the total population tends to zero is strikingly different from that in local diffusion case.

AI.tldr: 建立了非局部扩散系统中基本再生数的变分刻画，即使主特征值不存在时也能有效描述
AI.motivation: 在非局部扩散传染病模型中，由于非紧性可能导致主特征值不存在，使得基本再生数这一关键阈值参数的变分刻画变得困难，需要建立即使主特征值不存在时的有效刻画方法
AI.techniques: 研究了非局部扩散算子的谱界，建立了Collatz-Wielandt刻画和自伴算子的Rayleigh-Ritz刻画，通过谱界为零的参数值来刻画基本再生数
AI.main_theorems: 建立了非局部扩散算子谱界的变分刻画，给出了谱界为零时唯一参数值的特征，覆盖了非退化和部分退化情况，得到了基本再生数的显式表达式
AI.significance: 为处理非局部扩散系统中主特征值不存在的情况提供了理论框架，应用于饱和发生率的SIS模型时发现退化情况下基本再生数在总人口趋于零时的极限行为与局部扩散情况有显著差异

title: Uniform boundedness for the two-dimensional Keller-Segel system with Gompertz growth
summary: It is known that in two dimensions the classical Keller-Segel model can lead to cell aggregation. This behavior can be controlled by adding a logistic growth term with quadratic decay. Researchers have tried to find weaker damping mechanisms that can still stabilize the system. Previous work showed that, under suitable assumptions on the initial cell distribution, even weaker growth terms than the classical logistic one can prevent aggregation. In this paper, we study the effect of a Gompertz-type growth term in a minimal two-dimensional chemotaxis model. This term provides a weaker damping effect than those previously considered. We analyze how it influences the system and identify conditions that guarantee that solutions exist for all time and remain bounded.

AI.tldr: 研究Gompertz型增长项对二维Keller-Segel趋化模型稳定性的影响，证明该弱阻尼机制仍能防止细胞聚集
AI.motivation: 经典二维Keller-Segel模型会导致细胞聚集，通常通过添加二次衰减的逻辑增长项来控制。研究者试图寻找更弱的阻尼机制来稳定系统，已有研究表明在某些初始条件下，比经典逻辑增长更弱的增长项也能防止聚集。本文研究Gompertz型增长项（比先前考虑的阻尼效应更弱）在最小二维趋化模型中的作用。
AI.techniques: 使用Gompertz型增长项（比逻辑增长更弱的非线性阻尼），分析其对Keller-Segel系统的影响，建立保证解全局存在和有界的条件
AI.main_theorems: 识别Gompertz型增长项下系统解全局存在且保持有界的条件，证明这种比先前考虑的阻尼机制更弱的增长项仍能防止细胞聚集
AI.significance: 扩展了Keller-Segel趋化模型的稳定性理论，表明比逻辑增长更弱的Gompertz型增长项仍能提供足够的阻尼来防止聚集，为生物系统中更自然的生长机制建模提供了理论支持

title: On the $q$-analogue of Duhamel's principle
summary: In this paper, we revisit the classical Duhamel's principle and provide a self-contained proof of this fundamental tool for linear evolution equations and systems of coupled equations. Moreover, we establish a $q$-analogue of Duhamel's principle for $q$-evolution equations of order $k\geq 1$ generated by Jackson's $q$-difference operator.

AI.tldr: 论文重新审视经典Duhamel原理，为线性演化方程和耦合方程组提供自包含证明，并建立Jackson q-差分算子生成的q-演化方程的q-模拟Duhamel原理。
AI.motivation: Duhamel原理是线性演化方程理论中的基本工具，但现有文献中缺乏自包含的证明。同时，需要将这一经典原理推广到q-演化方程框架中，以处理q-差分算子生成的系统。
AI.techniques: 使用自包含的证明方法处理经典Duhamel原理；引入Jackson q-差分算子；建立q-演化方程的q-模拟原理；处理k阶q-演化方程。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 线性演化方程和耦合方程组的经典Duhamel原理的自包含证明；2. 针对Jackson q-差分算子生成的k阶q-演化方程的q-模拟Duhamel原理。
AI.significance: 填补了Duhamel原理证明的空白，为q-演化和q-差分方程理论提供了基础工具，扩展了经典演化方程理论到量子演化和离散时间框架。

title: On the Limiting Behavior of $L^2$-Critical Pseudo-Relativistic Fermi Systems
summary: We consider ground states of a pseudo-relativistic Fermi system in the $L^2$-critical case. We prove that the system admits ground states, if and only if the attractive strength $a$ satisfies $0<a<D_{4/3,2}$, where $D_{4/3,2}\in(0, \infty)$ is the optimal constant of a dual fractional Lieb--Thirring inequality. The limiting behavior of ground states for the system is further analyzed as $a\nearrow D_{4/3,2}$. As a byproduct, the qualitative properties of optimizers for the dual fractional Lieb-Thirring inequality are also investigated.

AI.tldr: 证明了伪相对论费米系统在L^2临界情况下存在基态的充要条件，并分析了基态在临界参数附近的极限行为
AI.motivation: 研究伪相对论费米系统的基态存在性问题，这类系统在量子力学和凝聚态物理中有重要应用，特别是在L^2临界情况下基态的存在条件是一个核心数学问题
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、对偶分数阶Lieb-Thirring不等式、紧性分析、极限行为分析，以及对偶分数阶Lieb-Thirring不等式优化子的定性性质研究
AI.main_theorems: 1. 系统存在基态的充要条件是吸引强度a满足0<a<D_{4/3,2}，其中D_{4/3,2}是对偶分数阶Lieb-Thirring不等式的最优常数；2. 分析了当a↗D_{4/3,2}时基态的极限行为；3. 研究了对偶分数阶Lieb-Thirring不等式优化子的定性性质
AI.significance: 为伪相对论费米系统的基态存在性提供了完整的数学刻画，建立了与分数阶Lieb-Thirring不等式的深刻联系，对量子多体系统和分数阶偏微分方程理论有重要意义

title: Concentrated solutions to fractional Schrödinger-Poisson system with non-homogeneous potentials
summary: This paper mainly investigates several limit properties of normalized solutions for the fractional Schrödinger-Poisson system, including existence, concentration behaviors and local uniqueness. It is worth noting that our results on the existence and asymptotic behaviors of normalized solutions are obtained in a doubly nonlocal setting and without assuming homogeneity of the potential, which generalize the results in \cite{GDCDS} in several aspects and improve our previous work in \cite{LIUYANG}. Meanwhile, some precise properties of solution sequence such as energy estimates, decay estimates and uniform regularity are also established by introducing some new techniques.

AI.tldr: 研究了分数阶薛定谔-泊松系统归一化解的极限性质，包括存在性、集中行为和局部唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶薛定谔-泊松系统在双重非局部设置下的归一化解的极限性质，该问题在量子力学和凝聚态物理中有重要应用，特别是在考虑长程相互作用时
AI.techniques: 引入新技术建立解序列的精确性质，包括能量估计、衰减估计和一致正则性；在非齐次势能假设下处理双重非局部问题
AI.main_theorems: 证明了归一化解的存在性、渐近行为（集中现象）、局部唯一性；建立了能量估计、衰减估计和一致正则性等精确性质
AI.significance: 推广了文献[GDCDS]的结果，改进了作者先前工作[LIUYANG]；在双重非局部和非齐次势能条件下获得更一般的结果，对分数阶偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: Mixing and enhanced dissipation in a time-translating shear flow
summary: Motivated in part by the work of Vanneste and Byatt-Smith, we study mixing and enhanced dissipation for the advection-diffusion equation with velocity field $\mathbf{u}(x,y,t)=(\sin(y-ct),0)$, a shear flow whose profile translates rigidly with speed $c$. This is a prototypical example of a flow whose critical points move in time. We quantify how the decay properties depend on the relation between translation speed $c$ and diffusivity $ν$. We first analyse the inviscid transport problem and establish time-averaged $H^{-1}$ mixing estimates for $t\lesssim c^{-1}$, yielding decay rates faster than stationary estimates. Building on these estimates, we prove enhanced dissipation for moderate translation speeds $c=c_0ν^\ell$ with $\ell\in(1/3,3/4)$. In this regime we obtain decay at rate $ν^{(1+2\ell)/5}$, which interpolates continuously between the sharp rates $ν^{1/2}$ for stationary shear flows with simple critical points and $ν^{1/3}$ for monotone flows. This quantifies how increasing translation speed progressively weakens the influence of the critical points. Comparing the inviscid mixing and enhanced dissipation timescales heuristically explains the lower endpoint $\ell=1/3$. For $c\gg 1$, we show that solutions remain close to those of the heat equation on fixed time intervals, such that the rapid translation averages out advection and weakens mixing. The mixing estimate relies on a refined stationary phase analysis exploiting cancellations generated by the motion of the critical points. The enhanced dissipation result requires an adaptation of the hypocoercivity framework for stationary shear flows to the non-autonomous setting. The translating flow prevents the commutator hierarchy from closing in the standard way, which we overcome by constructing an extended energy functional. The large-$c$ analysis exploits the averaging effect of rapid translations in this regime.

AI.tldr: 研究平动剪切流中临界点运动对混合和增强耗散的影响，建立了混合速率与平动速度-扩散系数关系的定量理论。
AI.motivation: 受Vanneste和Byatt-Smith工作启发，研究速度场$\mathbf{u}(x,y,t)=(\sin(y-ct),0)$的平动剪切流，这是临界点随时间运动的典型例子，旨在量化衰减特性如何依赖于平动速度$c$和扩散系数$ν$的关系。
AI.techniques: 精细的驻相分析（利用临界点运动产生的相消）、非自治剪切流的亚椭圆框架适应、扩展能量泛函构造、快速平动平均效应分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 无粘输运问题的时间平均$H^{-1}$混合估计；2) 中等平动速度$c=c_0ν^\ell$ ($\ell\in(1/3,3/4)$)下的增强耗散，衰减速率$ν^{(1+2\ell)/5}$；3) 大$c$下解接近热方程解，平动平均化对流效应。
AI.significance: 首次系统量化平动速度对剪切流混合和耗散的影响，建立了从静止剪切流($ν^{1/2}$)到单调流($ν^{1/3}$)的连续插值理论，揭示了临界点运动如何渐进削弱其影响，为非自治剪切流分析提供新框架。

title: Energy cascade for cross-shear length scales in free-shear three-dimensional incompressible viscous flows
summary: The phenomenon of energy cascade is addressed in the case of free-shear flows, modeled with the equations for incompressible Newtonian fluids with mixed periodic and free-slip boundary conditions driven by an imposed mean shear profile. The rigorous results are proved for ensemble averages with respect to stationary statistical solutions in the sense of Foias and Prodi. We obtain the energy-budget relations with an energy dissipation term, a shear-production term from the mean flow, and an energy flux term of the fluctuation field, based on a decomposition of the flow into high and low horizontal wavenumber components, corresponding to scales perpendicular to the mean shear gradient. We estimate the shear-production term exploiting the orthogonality of horizontal Fourier modes and look for an energy cascade of the fluctuation flux. For any given wavenumber, we define an associated horizontal Taylor wavenumber of the high-wavenumber band above the given wavenumber. We prove two energy cascade results, for the energy flux and for a restricted energy flux that discounts possible energy loss to flow singularities, both valid for wavenumbers whose associated horizontal Taylor wavenumber lies above the viscous shear wavenumber and whose low-wavenumber energy dissipation rate is negligible compared to the total energy dissipation rate. On heuristic grounds, these rigorous conditions correspond precisely to an energy cascade in the range from the classical Corrsin scale down to the Kolmogorov dissipation scale, as expected in the conventional theory of turbulent shear flows.

AI.tldr: 该论文在自由剪切流中建立了能量级串的严格数学理论，证明了能量预算关系并给出了能量级串存在的充分条件。
AI.motivation: 研究自由剪切湍流中的能量级串现象，特别是如何从数学上严格描述剪切流中能量从大尺度向小尺度的传递过程，这是湍流理论中的核心问题。
AI.techniques: 使用Foias和Prodi的平稳统计解理论，通过水平波数分解将流场分为高低波数分量，利用水平傅里叶模式的正交性估计剪切产生项，定义水平泰勒波数来分析能量级串。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了两个能量级串结果：1）对于能量通量；2）对于扣除流向奇点可能能量损失的受限能量通量。两个结果都要求关联的水平泰勒波数高于粘性剪切波数，且低波数能量耗散率相对于总耗散率可忽略。
AI.significance: 为剪切湍流中的能量级串提供了严格的数学基础，将传统的物理直觉（从Corrsin尺度到Kolmogorov耗散尺度的级串）转化为精确的数学条件，推动了湍流统计理论的数学严谨化。

title: Monotonicity for the fractional semi-linear problem in a half space
summary:
In this paper, we study semilinear fractional equations $$(-Δ)^s u(x) = f(u(x))$$ in a half-space and prove that all positive solutions are strictly increasing in the $x_n$-direction.
  Previous results typically require the solution $u$ to be globally bounded in $\mathbb{R}^n$. We substantially weaken this condition by assuming only that $u$ be bounded in each slab. Moreover, our analysis relies solely on the local Lipschitz continuity of the nonlinearity $f$, which is weaker than the conditions imposed in earlier works.
  As a crucial ingredient, we obtained a boundary H\"{older} regularity estimate that requires only the boundedness of $u$ near the boundary. This represents a significant improvement over existing results, which often assumed global boundedness of $u$ throughout $\mathbb{R}^n$. The proof introduces a new idea that may be of independent interest.
  To derive the monotonicity, we employ the method of moving planes. We first obtain a narrow region principle in unbounded domains, which ensures that the moving plane procedure can be initiated from $x_n = 0$. We then establish two averaging effects for the solutions to fractional equations. These key ingredients guarantee that the planes can be moved continuously all the way to $x_n = \infty$.
  Previously, narrow region principle can only be applied to a single narrow region. It is for the first time that we establish a multiple narrow region principle that can be applied simultaneously to finitely many narrow regions.
  Compared with the traditional approaches, methods based on the {\em averaging effect} require substantially weaker regularity assumptions and can even accommodate unbounded solutions.
  We believe that these new ideas and techniques develop here will serve as powerful tools in studying qualitative properties of solutions to fractional equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了半空间中分数阶半线性方程正解在$x_n$方向严格单调递增，显著弱化了传统对解全局有界性的要求
AI.motivation: 研究半空间中分数阶半线性方程$(-Δ)^s u = f(u)$正解的单调性性质，传统方法要求解在$\mathbb{R}^n$上全局有界，这限制了应用范围
AI.techniques: 移动平面法、多重窄区域原理、平均效应、边界Hölder正则性估计、局部Lipschitz非线性条件
AI.main_theorems: 1. 半空间中分数阶半线性方程所有正解在$x_n$方向严格递增；2. 仅需解在每个带状区域有界而非全局有界；3. 建立了多重窄区域原理；4. 获得了仅需边界附近有界性的边界Hölder正则性估计
AI.significance: 显著弱化了分数阶方程单调性理论的假设条件，发展了适用于无界解的新技术，为分数阶方程定性研究提供了新工具

title: Nonlinear Wave Dynamics in Black Hole Spacetimes
summary:
This manuscript is a lightly reformatted version of my 2017 PhD thesis. I am posting it on arXiv at the request of my advisor, Sergiu Klainerman, who noted that it has been useful to some students. The content largely reflects the thesis in its original form.
  This thesis details a method for proving global boundedness and decay results for nonlinear wave equations on black hole spacetimes. The method is applied to five example problems of increasing difficulty. The first problem, which addresses the semilinear wave equation on Minkowski space, is quite simple and should be accessible to a reader who is still new to the field of partial differential equations. The final problem, which was posed by Ionescu and Klainerman in [IK14], constitutes a step toward proving stability for slowly rotating Kerr black holes. The remaining intermediate problems are: a semilinear wave equation on the Schwarzschild spacetime, a semilinear wave equation on any subextremal Kerr spacetime with the additional assumption of axisymmetry, and a restriction of the final problem to the Schwarzschild case.
  The method used in this thesis is based on a few particular developments that may be useful for other related problems. These include: a new method for constructing Morawetz-type estimates that is fairly robust (insofar as it may be successfully applied to all five problems), a strategy based on a decay hierarchy for energy estimates on uniformly spacelike hypersurfaces using, in particular, a notion of weak decay, and a technique for handling certain terms with factors that are singular on an axis of symmetry.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种证明黑洞时空上非线性波动方程全局有界性和衰减结果的方法，并应用于五个难度递增的示例问题。
AI.motivation: 研究黑洞时空上非线性波动方程的全局行为，特别是为证明缓慢旋转Kerr黑洞稳定性提供工具，这是广义相对论中的重要数学问题。
AI.techniques: 1) 构造Morawetz型估计的新方法；2) 基于衰减层级的能量估计策略，使用弱衰减概念；3) 处理对称轴上奇异因子的技术。
AI.main_theorems: 将方法应用于五个问题：Minkowski空间半线性波动方程、Schwarzschild时空半线性波动方程、轴对称子极值Kerr时空半线性波动方程、Schwarzschild情况下的最终问题限制、以及Ionescu-Klainerman提出的缓慢旋转Kerr黑洞稳定性相关问题。
AI.significance: 为黑洞时空上波动方程研究提供了系统分析框架，特别是为证明Kerr黑洞稳定性这一广义相对论核心问题提供了重要技术工具，对数学物理和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: Localized Enhanced Dissipation: A Hypocoercivity Approach
summary: In this paper, we consider the passive scalar solutions in shear flows with critical points. With a detailed hypocoercivity functional, we develop streamline-wise enhanced dissipation estimates.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有临界点的剪切流中被动标量解的流线增强耗散估计
AI.motivation: 研究剪切流中被动标量输运问题，特别关注流场中存在临界点（速度为零的点）的情况，这类问题在流体力学和输运现象中具有基础重要性
AI.techniques: 使用详细的hypocoercivity泛函方法，发展流线方向的增强耗散估计技术，处理临界点带来的数学困难
AI.main_theorems: 建立了剪切流中被动标量解的增强耗散估计，特别处理了临界点附近的渐近行为
AI.significance: 为具有临界点的剪切流中的被动标量输运提供了新的数学分析框架，对理解流体混合、热传导等物理过程有重要意义

title: Quantitative Closure Analysis toward Ideal Fluids
comment: 146 pages, This arXiv preprint is the detailed companion to the compact journal-submission version of the same title and is posted on arXiv.org for readers' convenience. This version is not intended for separate journal publication
summary: We establish the incompressible low--Mach/high--Reynolds limit for the Boltzmann equation for a broad class of initial data, without recourse to any asymptotic expansion. Exploiting the local Maxwellian manifold and the macro--micro decomposition, together with dispersive control of the acoustic component, we obtain quantitative estimates on the purely microscopic fluctuation, as well as a control of the entropic fluctuation and a kinetic vorticity in terms of their initial data. As a consequence, in two space dimensions the rescaled velocity and temperature converge to a global solution in the sense of DiPerna--Lions--Majda and Delort of the incompressible Euler equations with an advected temperature.

AI.tldr: 建立了Boltzmann方程在不可压缩低马赫数/高雷诺数极限下的严格收敛性，无需渐近展开。
AI.motivation: 研究Boltzmann方程在不可压缩流体力学极限下的行为，特别是低马赫数和高雷诺数极限，这是连接动理学理论与宏观流体力学的重要问题。
AI.techniques: 利用局部Maxwell流形、宏观-微观分解、声学分量的色散控制，以及微观涨落、熵涨落和动涡度的定量估计。
AI.main_theorems: 在二维空间中，重标度后的速度和温度收敛到DiPerna-Lions-Majda和Delort意义下的不可压缩Euler方程全局解，且温度被平流输运。
AI.significance: 为Boltzmann方程到不可压缩Euler方程的极限提供了严格的数学基础，避免了传统的渐近展开方法，具有重要的理论意义。

title: On the stability of multi-dimensional rarefaction waves with vorticity
summary: We study the stability of centered rarefaction waves for 2D isentropic compressible Euler equations for polytropic gas. The proof relies on the energy estimates on acoustical waves and vorticity wave simultaneously \emph{without loss of derivatives} in rarefaction wave region via reformulating the Euler equation as a wave-transport system introduced by Luk-Speck in \cite{LukSpeck2D}, which removes the irrotational assumption of Luo-Yu \cite{Luo-YuRare1, Luo-YuRare2}. As applications, we show that the local existence of piecewise continuous solutions to the Riemann problem in the perturbative regime of \emph{shock wave-rarefaction wave} and \emph{rarefaction wave-vortex sheet-rarefaction wave}.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维等熵可压缩欧拉方程中中心稀疏波的稳定性，并应用于激波-稀疏波和稀疏波-涡层-稀疏波等Riemann问题的局部存在性
AI.motivation: 研究二维等熵可压缩欧拉方程中稀疏波的稳定性问题，特别是要克服Luo-Yu工作中需要无旋假设的限制，建立更一般的稳定性理论
AI.techniques: 采用Luk-Speck引入的波-输运系统重新表述欧拉方程，同时对声波和涡旋波进行无导数损失的能量估计，在稀疏波区域实现同步分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了中心稀疏波的稳定性，并建立了激波-稀疏波和稀疏波-涡层-稀疏波Riemann问题在扰动区域内的局部存在性
AI.significance: 去除了先前工作中的无旋假设限制，为更一般的二维可压缩流问题提供了理论框架，对Riemann问题的研究具有重要意义

title: Towards a Gagliardo-Type Theory of Fractional Sobolev Spaces on Arbitrary Time Scales
summary: We introduce a Gagliardo-type approach to fractional Sobolev spaces on arbitrary time scales, based on the Lebesgue $Δ$-measure and on nonlocal interaction energies defined on the off-diagonal set $Ω_T \subset T \times T$. For constant fractional order $α\in (0,1)$ and $1 \le p < \infty$, we define the associated fractional seminorm and the corresponding space $W^{α,p}_Δ(T)$, and we show that this construction is well posed in the measure-theoretic setting of time scales. In particular, we establish that these spaces are Banach spaces for all $1 \le p < \infty$, reflexive for $1 < p < \infty$, and Hilbert spaces in the case $p=2$. We then prove a Poincaré-type inequality on a natural class of bounded hybrid time scales, showing that the geometry of the underlying time scale enters the theory already at the level of coercive estimates. The construction recovers, within a unified framework, the continuous, discrete, and hybrid settings. We conclude by briefly indicating a possible extension to variable-order nonlocal spaces, which will be studied separately.

AI.tldr: 在任意时间尺度上引入基于Gagliardo方法的分数阶Sobolev空间理论，统一处理连续、离散和混合情形。
AI.motivation: 传统分数阶Sobolev空间理论主要针对连续或离散情形，缺乏统一框架处理时间尺度上的非局部问题，需要建立适用于任意时间尺度的分数阶Sobolev空间理论。
AI.techniques: 基于Lebesgue Δ-测度和非局部相互作用能量的Gagliardo方法，利用时间尺度上的测度论框架，在非对角集上定义分数阶半范数。
AI.main_theorems: 定义了时间尺度上的分数阶Sobolev空间W^{α,p}_Δ(T)，证明其是Banach空间(1≤p<∞)，自反空间(1<p<∞)，p=2时为Hilbert空间；在有界混合时间尺度上建立了Poincaré型不等式。
AI.significance: 为时间尺度上的分数阶微积分提供了统一框架，将连续、离散和混合情形纳入同一理论体系，为时间尺度上的非局部偏微分方程研究奠定基础。

title: Local Existence and Finite-Time Singularity Formation in the Vlasov-Poisson-Isotropic Landau System
summary:
The isotropic Landau (Coulomb) operator was introduced in kinetic theory by Krieger and Strain (Comm. Partial Differential Equations, 2012). In this work, we study the spatially inhomogeneous Vlasov--Poisson--isotropic Landau system. We first establish a local--in--time existence theory for the Cauchy problem: for initial data satisfying a suitable smallness condition in an appropriate norm, there exists a non--negative solution on a time interval $[0,T]$, where the lifespan $T$ depends on the size of the initial data.
  Beyond the local theory, we investigate a mechanism that may lead to the breakdown of global existence. We show that finite--time singularity formation can occur in the gravitationally attractive case, provided that the weak solution satisfies certain a priori regularity and decay assumptions, the initial gravitational field energy exceeds the kinetic energy, and the resulting energy gap dominates the diffusive effect of the collision operator. As a consequence, if the solution is further assumed to belong to a suitable measure space up to the maximal existence time, it collapses to a single point in physical space at that time. The proof of finite--time singularity formation is based on deriving an upper bound for the second spatial moment, which becomes negative in finite time.

AI.tldr: 研究了Vlasov-Poisson-各向同性Landau系统的局部存在性和引力吸引情形下的有限时间奇异性形成机制
AI.motivation: 研究空间非均匀的Vlasov-Poisson-各向同性Landau系统，该模型由Krieger和Strain在2012年引入动理学理论，结合了等离子体物理中的Vlasov-Poisson方程和各向同性Landau碰撞算子
AI.techniques: 使用能量方法、正则性估计、空间矩分析，通过推导第二空间矩的上界来证明奇异性形成
AI.main_theorems: 1. 局部存在性：在适当小性条件下建立Cauchy问题的局部解；2. 有限时间奇异性：在引力吸引情形下，当初值引力场能量超过动能且能量差主导碰撞算子的扩散效应时，解会在有限时间内形成奇异性
AI.significance: 首次系统研究了Vlasov-Poisson-各向同性Landau系统的奇异性形成机制，为理解等离子体物理中引力坍缩现象提供了严格数学基础

title: Global regularity and sharp decay rates to the 1D hypo-viscous compressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary: In this paper, we study the global regularity and sharp decay rates for the isentropic hypo-viscous compressible Navier-Stokes equations in 1D. Firstly, we prove the global stability for the small initial data near a stable equilibrium. Especially, we establish the global critical regularity in the Sobolev space $H^β$ with $\frac{1}{2}<β<1$. Furthermore, by bootstrap argument, Fourier splitting method and energy method, we then establish the optimal time decay rates under the extra low-frequency smallness assumption. We find the $L^2$ energy is self-closed, which motivates us to obtain the existence of global large solutions for initial data with high regularity. By a pure energy method, we also derive the optimal time decay rates when $\frac{1}{2}\leβ<\frac{3}{4}$. We find a phenomenon that $\|(a,u)\|_{L^2}$ still decays even if the initial data does not possess $L^2$ smallness. Notably, the low-frequency smallness assumption is removed in the case with $\frac{1}{2}\leβ<\frac{3}{4}$.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了1D等熵亚粘性可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局正则性、尖锐衰减率和大解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究一维等熵亚粘性可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局正则性和时间衰减行为，这类方程具有分数阶耗散特性，其数学分析比经典Navier-Stokes方程更具挑战性
AI.techniques: 使用自举论证、傅里叶分裂方法、能量方法、Sobolev空间理论，特别利用了L²能量的自封闭性质
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在Sobolev空间H^β(1/2<β<1)中建立全局临界正则性；2) 在额外低频小性假设下获得最优时间衰减率；3) 证明高正则性初始数据下全局大解的存在性；4) 当1/2≤β<3/4时，无需低频小性假设即可获得最优衰减率
AI.significance: 首次系统研究了亚粘性可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局正则性和衰减行为，发现了L²能量的自封闭性质，揭示了即使初始数据无L²小性仍能衰减的现象，对分数阶耗散流体方程理论有重要贡献

title: Smooth finite time singularity formation without quantization
summary: We revisit the finite time singularity formation of Krieger-Schlag-Tataru [KST09] for the focusing energy critical wave equation in $\mathbb{R}^{3+1}$ from a geometric singular-analytic point of view, following Hintz [Hintz23]. We construct $C^{ν/2-}$ regular approximate solutions that settle down to multiple solitons, shrinking at a rate $t^ν$ with $ν>1$, and approaching the origin on different geodesics $\{x=zt\}$. By fine tuning the velocities, sizes and signs of the solitons, we are able to construct smooth ansätze with any $ν>8$. Using robust energy estimates, the ansätze are corrected to exact solutions.

AI.tldr: 该论文从几何奇异分析角度重新研究了三维能量临界波动方程的有限时间奇点形成，构造了多孤立子收缩的精确解。
AI.motivation: 重新审视Krieger-Schlag-Tataru (2009)关于三维能量临界波动方程有限时间奇点形成的工作，从Hintz (2023)的几何奇异分析视角出发，研究多孤立子收缩的奇点形成机制。
AI.techniques: 几何奇异分析方法、精细调参技术（速度、大小、符号）、$C^{ν/2-}$正则性近似解构造、鲁棒性能量估计、多孤立子相互作用分析。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了收缩速率为$t^ν$（$ν>1$）的多孤立子近似解，通过精细调参可构造任意$ν>8$的光滑拟解，最终通过能量估计修正为精确解。
AI.significance: 为能量临界波动方程的奇点形成提供了新的几何视角，发展了多孤立子相互作用的分析方法，深化了对奇点形成机制的理解。

title: Two-phase free boundary problems for operators with nonstandard growth
comment: To our dear friend Sandro Salsa, a free boundaries master, on the occasion of his 75th birthday
summary: In this paper we focus the attention on free boundary problems ruled by partial differential equations with nonstandard growth, presenting in particular some recent results. The interest in these problems stems from the diverse applications that motivate their study and from the challenging mathematical difficulties they pose.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了具有非标准增长条件的偏微分方程自由边界问题的最新研究进展
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于这些问题的广泛应用背景和它们带来的数学挑战，非标准增长条件在材料科学、图像处理等领域有重要应用
AI.techniques: 主要涉及非标准增长条件下的偏微分方程理论，包括变分方法、正则性理论、自由边界分析等
AI.main_theorems: 这是一篇综述性论文，主要介绍该领域的最新研究成果，而非提出新的定理
AI.significance: 总结了非标准增长自由边界问题的重要进展，为该领域的进一步发展提供了理论框架和研究方向

title: Lipschitz regularity of solutions to two-phase $p$-Laplacian free boundary problems with right hand side
summary:
We prove the local Lipschitz continuity of viscosity solutions for two-phase free boundary problems for the $p$-Laplacian with non-zero right hand side, where $p\in (1,\infty)$. This is the optimal regularity for the problem.
  We also obtain the local Hölder continuity for a larger class of problems.
  The results introduced here are new even in the homogeneous situation, that is, when the right hand side is zero.
  Our work applies to merely viscosity solutions, which allows a wide applicability.

AI.tldr: 证明了p-Laplacian两相自由边界问题粘性解的局部Lipschitz连续性，这是该问题的最优正则性
AI.motivation: 研究p-Laplacian两相自由边界问题中粘性解的正则性，特别是当右端项非零时的最优正则性结果，即使在齐次情形（右端项为零）下也是新的
AI.techniques: 使用粘性解方法，处理非齐次p-Laplacian自由边界问题，通过分析两相界面处的正则性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了p-Laplacian两相自由边界问题粘性解的局部Lipschitz连续性（最优正则性） 2. 对更广泛的问题类获得了局部Hölder连续性
AI.significance: 这是p-Laplacian自由边界问题正则性理论的重要进展，即使在齐次情形下也是新结果，为更广泛的应用提供了理论基础

title: Singular limits for non-isentropic compressible rotating fluids
summary: In this article, we study the singular limit of non-isentropic compressible rotating fluids. We incorporate the capillary effect into both the $α=1$ and $α=0$ cases, and investigate the Navier-Stokes-Korteweg equations involving the terms of low Mach number, low Rossby number and high Reynolds number. When $α=1$, the dispersion estimate of the acoustic wave equation is derived by Rage's theorem. When $α=0$, we obtain the convergence results by error estimate. Moreover, we obtain that the three dimensions compressible Navier-Stokes-Korteweg equations converge to the two dimensions incompressible Euler equations.

AI.tldr: 研究非等熵可压缩旋转流体在包含毛细效应时的奇异极限，得到三维可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg方程收敛到二维不可压缩Euler方程的结果
AI.motivation: 研究非等熵可压缩旋转流体在低马赫数、低罗斯贝数和高雷诺数条件下的奇异极限问题，特别关注毛细效应对α=1和α=0两种情况的影响
AI.techniques: 使用Rage定理推导声波方程的色散估计（α=1情况），通过误差估计获得收敛结果（α=0情况），结合低马赫数、低罗斯贝数和高雷诺数极限分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. α=1时通过Rage定理得到声波方程的色散估计；2. α=0时通过误差估计获得收敛结果；3. 三维可压缩Navier-Stokes-Korteweg方程收敛到二维不可压缩Euler方程
AI.significance: 为旋转流体力学中的奇异极限问题提供了新的理论框架，特别考虑了毛细效应的影响，对理解大气和海洋动力学中的多尺度现象有重要意义

title: Length-explicit stability analysis of Helmholtz problems in leaky circular waveguides
summary: Motivated by the study and simulation of long, coiled optical fibers we consider in this article a simplified model that is prevalent in the engineering community. Mathematically, the problem is specified as follows: Time-harmonic wave propagation is modeled by the Helmholtz equation; the waveguide is a bounded circular section with a transparent boundary condition on one end; the dissipation of energy is modeled by an impedance boundary condition on the outer hull of the waveguide. We show a stability estimate that is explicit in terms of the angular length of the waveguide. The analysis is based on a separation of variables ansatz and the study of the related (nonselfadjoint) modal eigenvalue problem. The key property there is to show that the modes form a Riesz basis in both $L^2$ and $H^1$ spaces. To this end we apply perturbation theory for selfadjoint operators and the concept of local subordination of perturbations [B. Mityagin and P. Siegl, JAM 139 (2019)]. Since the possibility of nontrivial Jordan chains cannot be ruled out, our whole methodology is conducted accordingly. In addition, in contrast to previous works, we include a bounded but heterogeneous part of the waveguide into our considered setting.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有阻抗边界条件的螺旋波导模型中波传播的稳定性估计，该估计显式依赖于波导的角长度
AI.motivation: 研究长螺旋光纤中波传播的简化模型，该模型在工程界广泛应用，涉及亥姆霍兹方程、透明边界条件和阻抗边界条件
AI.techniques: 变量分离法、非自伴模态特征值问题分析、Riesz基理论、自伴算子摄动理论、局部从属摄动概念
AI.main_theorems: 建立了波传播的稳定性估计，证明了模态在L^2和H^1空间中形成Riesz基，处理了可能存在的非平凡Jordan链
AI.significance: 为螺旋波导中的波传播提供了严格的数学分析框架，首次包含了有界异质部分，对光纤通信和波导设计有重要应用价值

title: Curved Ingham inequalities and observability of the toroidal Schr{ö}dinger equation
summary: We prove that solutions of the toroidal Schr{ö}dinger equation can be observed from suitably curved space-time trajectories, thus of zero Lebesgue measure. To do so, we establish new upper and lower bounds for certain trigonometric sums along curves, in the spirit of the celebrated Ingham inequality. In a second part, we establish observability properties over arbitrarily short curves of the low-and high-frequency components separately. For the low-frequency component, we establish strong restrictions on the zero sets of the trigonometric sums under consideration.

AI.tldr: 证明了环面薛定谔方程的解可以从适当弯曲的零测度时空轨迹观测
AI.motivation: 研究薛定谔方程在环面上的可观测性问题，特别是从零测度（弯曲时空轨迹）进行观测的可能性，这是控制理论和偏微分方程中的重要问题
AI.techniques: 建立了沿曲线的三角和的新上下界（类似Ingham不等式），分析了三角和的零点集结构，分离处理低频和高频分量
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了环面薛定谔方程的解可以从适当弯曲的零测度时空轨迹观测；2. 建立了任意短曲线上低频和高频分量分别的可观测性；3. 对低频分量建立了三角和零点集的强限制条件
AI.significance: 扩展了薛定谔方程的可观测性理论，证明了零测度观测的可能性，为控制理论和偏微分方程控制问题提供了新的数学工具和理论框架

title: Global stability in an age-structured SIRS malaria transmission model
summary: This paper proposes and analyzes a malaria transmission model structured by the chronological age of the human host population. The model couples an age-structured SIRS system for humans, incorporating waning immunity, with an SI system for mosquitoes under mass-action transmissions. Using integrated semigroup theory and spectral analysis, we establish the well-posedness of the model, derive the basic reproduction number, and prove the global asymptotic stability of the parasite-free equilibrium by using a Lyapunov functional, when $R_0\leq 1$, thereby excluding the possibility of backward bifurcation. Numerical simulations further suggest the global stability of the endemic equilibrium when $R_0>1$.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析了一个基于人类宿主年龄结构的疟疾传播模型，证明了无病平衡点的全局渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究疟疾传播中年龄结构的影响，特别是人类宿主年龄对疾病传播动力学的作用，建立更符合实际的数学模型
AI.techniques: 使用积分半群理论和谱分析建立适定性，推导基本再生数，利用Lyapunov泛函证明稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 1) 模型适定性；2) 基本再生数R₀的推导；3) 当R₀≤1时无病平衡点的全局渐近稳定性；4) 排除后向分支的可能性
AI.significance: 为年龄结构传染病模型提供了严格的理论框架，对疟疾控制策略有指导意义，证明了无后向分支特性简化了控制阈值分析

title: Lipschitz solutions to mean field games with a major player and applications
summary: This paper introduces a notion of weak solution for the coupled system of master equations in mean field games with a major player. It extends the previously introduced notion of Lipschitz solutions in mean field games. By relying on a probabilistic representation of the system of master equations, we prove that there can exist at most one sufficiently smooth solution and that it is consistent with the associated Nash equilibrium. In this approach, coefficients are only required to be Lipschitz, in particular, no differentiability assumption with respect to probability measures is needed. In a second part, we apply this notion of solution to prove the existence and uniqueness of solutions to MFGs with a major player on intervals of arbitrary length. Our argument relies on assuming that the intensity of the Brownian common noise driving the state of the major player is sufficiently large, as well as a joint displacement monotonicity assumption between the coefficients of minor players and those of the major player. Most notably, this joint monotonicity allows us to prove that the threshold of volatility can be taken independently of the horizon of the game considered, without any long time decoupling assumption on the dependence between minor players and the major player. Finally, inspired by recent extragradient methods for mean field games, we present an algorithm that converges exponentially fast to the solution of the major-minor probabilistic system under this monotonicity assumption. Thanks to the generality of our approach, all results presented in this article hold for mean field games of controls with a major player.

AI.tldr: 提出了具有主要参与者的平均场博弈中耦合主方程系统的弱解概念，并证明了在适当单调性条件下任意时间区间上解的存在唯一性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有主要参与者的平均场博弈（MFG）系统，这类系统包含一个主要参与者和大量次要参与者，需要处理耦合的主方程系统。先前研究需要系数的可微性假设，本文旨在放宽这些条件，建立更一般的弱解理论。
AI.techniques: 使用主方程的概率表示方法；引入联合位移单调性假设；利用布朗运动的共同噪声强度足够大的条件；借鉴平均场博弈的外梯度方法设计收敛算法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了充分光滑解的唯一性及其与纳什均衡的一致性；2. 在任意长度区间上建立了具有主要参与者的MFG解的存在唯一性；3. 设计了指数快速收敛到解的算法。
AI.significance: 扩展了平均场博弈的弱解理论，放宽了对概率测度可微性的要求；首次在任意时间区间上建立了具有主要参与者的MFG解的存在性；提出的算法为数值计算提供了有效工具；结果适用于具有主要参与者的控制平均场博弈。

title: High viscosity limit for the multi-dimensional compressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary: We investigate the high viscosity limit (also called inertial limit) of the barotropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations supplemented with initial data which are perturbations of a stable constant solution. In the case of constant viscosity coefficients, we establish that, after diffusive rescaling, the density tends to satisfy a transport equation with nonlinear damping which is globally well-posed, even for large data. Similar results are proved for variable viscosity coefficients. In this latter case, the damping term in the limit equation of the density is nonlocal.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的高粘度极限，证明了在扩散尺度下密度满足具有非线性阻尼的输运方程
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在高粘度极限下的渐近行为，特别关注密度场的极限方程，这对于理解流体在强阻尼下的动力学行为具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 采用扩散尺度变换，分析高粘度极限下的渐近展开，处理常粘度和变粘度系数两种情况，建立全局适定性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 常粘度系数下，密度满足具有非线性阻尼的输运方程且全局适定；2. 变粘度系数下，密度满足具有非局部阻尼项的极限方程
AI.significance: 为可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的高粘度极限提供了严格的数学理论，揭示了强阻尼下流体密度的渐近行为，对理解粘性主导的流体动力学有重要理论价值

title: The one-dimensional compressible Navier-Stokes equations in critical regularity spaces
summary: We are concerned with the barotropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations on the real line. Our primary goal is to establish the global well-posedness in a critical regularity framework in the case where the initial data are small perturbations of a stable constant state. Surprisingly, even though the result in the multi-dimensional case is by now classical, the one-dimensional case has not been elucidated yet as far as we know. This is due to the fact that in the critical framework, the regularity of the velocity is so negative that some nonlinear terms are out of control. Here, we overcome the difficulty by considering the equations in the mass Lagrangian coordinates system. Granted with a global well-posedness statement, we then establish optimal time decay estimates and investigate the high viscosity limit, pointing out the convergence of the specific volume to the solution of some ordinary differential equation, after time and space rescaling.

AI.tldr: 在质量拉格朗日坐标系下建立了一维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在临界正则性框架中的全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究一维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在临界正则性框架下的全局适定性问题。虽然多维情况已有经典结果，但一维情况由于速度的正则性过低导致非线性项难以控制，尚未得到解决。
AI.techniques: 采用质量拉格朗日坐标系，克服临界正则性框架中速度正则性过低的问题；建立全局适定性后，进一步研究最优时间衰减估计和高粘性极限。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在质量拉格朗日坐标系下建立一维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局适定性；2. 获得最优时间衰减估计；3. 研究高粘性极限，证明比容在时空重新标度下收敛到某个常微分方程的解。
AI.significance: 填补了一维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在临界正则性框架下全局适定性研究的空白，为理解一维可压缩流体动力学提供了新的理论工具，并揭示了高粘性极限下的渐近行为。

title: Large time behaviour of the fractional heat equation associated with the Dunkl Laplacian
summary: We consider the fractional heat equation associated with the Dunkl Laplacian and prove that the weak solutions to this equation converge to the fundamental solution as time becomes large, provided the initial data is an integrable function with respect to the associated measure. As an application, we also prove a similar result for the corresponding nonlinear equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了Dunkl拉普拉斯算子相关的分数热方程弱解在时间趋于无穷时收敛于基本解，并推广到相应非线性方程
AI.motivation: 研究Dunkl拉普拉斯算子相关的分数热方程的长时间行为，这类方程在带反射群的对称空间分析中具有重要性，需要理解其解在时间趋于无穷时的渐近性质
AI.techniques: 使用Dunkl分析框架，结合分数热核的估计，通过弱收敛方法和测度理论分析解的渐近行为，并利用线性结果推广到非线性情形
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于Dunkl分数热方程，当初值关于关联测度可积时，弱解在时间趋于无穷时收敛于基本解；2. 对相应的非线性方程也建立了类似的收敛结果
AI.significance: 扩展了经典热方程长时间行为理论到Dunkl算子框架，为带反射群对称性的偏微分方程分析提供了新工具，在数学物理和几何分析中有潜在应用

title: Riesz transforms associated with the Grushin operator with drift
summary: We consider the Grushin operator with drift which is symmetric with respect to a measure having exponential growth. For the corresponding Riesz transforms, we study strong-type $(p, p)$, $1 < p < \infty$, and weak-type $(1, 1)$ boundedness.

AI.tldr: 研究带漂移项的Grushin算子的Riesz变换在指数增长测度下的强型和弱型有界性
AI.motivation: Grushin算子是一类重要的次椭圆算子，在几何分析和偏微分方程中有广泛应用。本文考虑带有漂移项的Grushin算子，该算子相对于指数增长测度对称，研究其对应的Riesz变换的有界性性质。
AI.techniques: 使用调和分析技术，特别是奇异积分理论；分析指数增长测度下的算子性质；研究强型(p,p)和弱型(1,1)有界性；处理带漂移项的Grushin算子的对称性条件。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于带漂移项的Grushin算子，其对应的Riesz变换在1 < p < ∞范围内具有强型(p,p)有界性，并且具有弱型(1,1)有界性。
AI.significance: 扩展了Grushin算子理论，建立了在指数增长测度和漂移项条件下的Riesz变换有界性结果，为相关偏微分方程的正则性理论和函数空间理论提供了基础。

title: Pogorelov interior estimates for general sum-type Hessian equations
summary: In this paper, we exploit the concavity of sums of Hessian operators to derive Pogorelov estimates for corresponding equations under the dynamic semi-convexity assumption, and we further obtain several Liouville-type results. Moreover, when k=n-1 and k=n we establish Pogorelov estimates in the admissible cone. As an application, we prove that any entire admissible solution in $\mathbb{R}^n$ with quadratic growth must be a quadratic polynomial.

AI.tldr: 利用Hessian算子和的凹性，在动态半凸性假设下推导Pogorelov估计，并得到Liouville型结果
AI.motivation: 研究Hessian型方程的正则性估计和整体解的结构，特别是Pogorelov估计和Liouville型定理，这些在完全非线性椭圆方程理论中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 利用Hessian算子和的凹性、动态半凸性假设、Pogorelov估计方法、容许锥分析、二次增长条件
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在动态半凸性假设下推导Pogorelov估计；2) 得到若干Liouville型结果；3) 当k=n-1和k=n时在容许锥中建立Pogorelov估计；4) 证明任何具有二次增长的整容许解必为二次多项式
AI.significance: 发展了完全非线性椭圆方程的Pogorelov估计理论，为Hessian型方程的整体解分类提供了新工具，对几何分析和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: Infinite-order multisoliton solutions to the Benjamin--Ono equation and soliton resolution
summary: We construct a class of infinite-order multisoliton solutions of the Benjamin-Ono equation on the line, for which the initial data exhibits slow spatial decay. We prove that in the long-time asymptotics, such a solution decouples as an infinite superposition of independent soliton solutions with different velocities and no radiation term.

AI.tldr: 构造了Benjamin-Ono方程在实线上具有慢空间衰减初值的无穷阶多孤子解，并证明其长时间渐近行为解耦为无穷多个独立孤子的叠加
AI.motivation: 研究Benjamin-Ono方程在初值具有慢空间衰减（非L^2可积）情况下的解结构，探索无穷多个孤子相互作用的渐近行为
AI.techniques: 使用逆散射变换方法构造无穷阶多孤子解，通过渐近分析证明长时间行为解耦，涉及谱分析和散射理论
AI.main_theorems: 构造了一类具有慢空间衰减初值的无穷阶多孤子解，证明在长时间渐近下解耦为无穷多个独立孤子解的叠加，无辐射项
AI.significance: 扩展了Benjamin-Ono方程解的理论，为慢衰减初值问题提供了新见解，对理解无穷多孤子系统的渐近行为有重要意义

title: Boundary symmetry breaking via logistic damping in a chemotaxis-growth system
summary: We establish global stability for a chemotaxis-growth model with logarithmic sensitivity under dynamic Dirichlet boundary conditions on a 1D domain. We analyze both parabolic-parabolic and parabolic-hyperbolic systems. The key challenge is handling time-dependent boundary data for the unknown functions. We overcome this by introducing dynamic reference profiles which suitably interpolate boundary values. Using an expanded entropy functional measuring deviation from these profiles, we prove energy estimates the uniform boundedness of solutions and global asymptotic stability of perturbations.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有对数敏感性的趋化-生长模型在动态Dirichlet边界条件下的全局稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究趋化-生长模型在动态边界条件下的全局稳定性问题，特别是处理时间依赖的边界数据对未知函数的影响
AI.techniques: 引入动态参考剖面插值边界值，构造扩展熵泛函测量偏离，进行能量估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了抛物-抛物和抛物-双曲系统的全局稳定性，包括解的一致有界性和扰动的全局渐近稳定性
AI.significance: 为具有对数敏感性的趋化模型在动态边界条件下的理论分析提供了新框架，扩展了稳定性理论的应用范围
